name: Whey Protein Blend
benefits: High-quality protein to support lean muscle maintenance during a deficit
Supports post-exercise recovery
Helps you reach a higher daily protein target
Low in sugar

keyIngredients.name: Whey Protein Isolate
keyIngredients.role: Complete protein for muscle support and satiety

howToUse: Mix 1 scoop with 250 ml of water or milk. Take within 30 minutes after training or as a protein top-up.
cautions: Not a substitute for a varied diet
Consult a professional if pregnant or on medication

name: Plant-Based Meal Shake
benefits: Balanced meal replacement to support a calorie deficit
Plant protein plus fibre to help you feel full
Supports gradual, sustainable weight management
Includes added vitamins and minerals

keyIngredients.name: Pea & Rice Protein
keyIngredients.role: Plant protein for satiety and lean mass

howToUse: Blend 2 scoops with 300 ml of water or plant milk to replace one meal per day.
cautions: Use as part of a calorie-controlled diet
Not intended as the sole source of nutrition

name: Omega-3 Complex
benefits: EPA and DHA to support cardiovascular health
Supports healthy cholesterol levels already within the normal range
Contributes to normal heart function

keyIngredients.name: Fish Oil (EPA + DHA)
keyIngredients.role: Omega-3 fatty acids for heart health

cautions: Consult a professional if on blood-thinning medication

name: Daily Multivitamin
benefits: Daily micronutrient base to fill common dietary gaps
B-vitamins contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism
Supports overall wellbeing
howToUse: Take 1 tablet daily with a meal.
cautions: Do not exceed the recommended dose
Keep out of reach of children

name: Hydration Electrolytes
benefits: Electrolytes to support daily hydration
Helps replace fluids lost through activity and sweat
Light flavour to make hitting your water target easier
howToUse: Dissolve 1 sachet in 500 ml of water. Drink 1–2 servings across the day toward your hydration target.
cautions: Part of a daily fluid plan, not a replacement for water

name: Fiber Complex
benefits: Soluble fibre to support fullness between meals
Supports digestive regularity
Helps moderate appetite within a calorie-controlled plan
howToUse: Mix 1 scoop with water before your two largest meals.

name: Pre-Workout Energy
benefits: Supports energy and focus before training
Helps you train harder to widen your daily energy expenditure
Light caffeine plus electrolytes
howToUse: Mix 1 scoop with 300 ml of water 20–30 minutes before exercise.
cautions: Contains caffeine — avoid late in the day
Not recommended for those sensitive to stimulants

name: Night Recovery Formula
benefits: Slow-release protein to support overnight muscle recovery
Supports lean mass retention during a deficit
Includes magnesium to support restful sleep

keyIngredients.name: Magnesium
keyIngredients.role: Supports muscle function and sleep quality

howToUse: Mix 1 scoop with 250 ml of water or milk about 30 minutes before bed.
cautions: Not a substitute for a varied diet
